candidates.name: hypothesis-typed
candidates.hypothesis: Categorizing hypotheses by type (bug-fix, performance, refactoring, safety, testing) and guiding toward underrepresented types improves solution space diversity

candidates.name: confidence-weighted
candidates.hypothesis: Weighting guidance sections by confidence based on sample counts focuses the agent's attention on more reliable patterns

candidates.name: adaptive-framing
candidates.hypothesis: Dynamically changing agent persona and task framing based on experiment progression (exploration vs exploitation) improves outcomes at all stages
